gist.headline: The hive writes a novel
gist.blurb: NovelSeek-Pro-PC is now in the showcase. It turns out writing a novel is slightly easier when a desktop app handles the outlines, chapters, cover art, and ebook export for you.
gist.summary: Added NovelSeek-Pro-PC to the creative apps directory, introducing a comprehensive desktop tool for end-to-end novel generation.
gist.impact: Writers can now discover and use a single interface to go from a blank page to a fully formatted ebook with generated cover art.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as an author. She's at a cozy wooden desk with a retro PC (referencing the desktop app), surrounded by stacks of books. The Monitor Robot is helping by holding a freshly printed book. Warm library vibes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting at a wooden desk typing on a retro PC. A cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a freshly bound book. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
